name: Distilled Non-Alcoholic Spirit Garden 108
description: A floral blend of hand-picked peas, homegrown hay and herbs inspired by  the English countryside. Why 108? It's the average number of days it  takes to sow, grow and hand-pick the peas used in this unique spirit. Serve over ice with tonic or soda and garnish with a handful of peas.

name: Distilled Non-Alcoholic Spirit Spice 94
description: A distilled non-alcoholic spirit, flavoured with an aromatic blend of  distilled spices, citrus peels and barks. With no added sweeteners,  sugars or artificial flavours, this spirit is best when served over ice  with tonic or soda and garnished with a grapefruit twist.
